name: Z Rush
short_description: Z Rush is an exciting strategic 3D game where your task is to place zombies in such a way that they can destroy all the turrets on the level.
detailed_description:
Z Rush is an exciting strategic 3D game where your task is to place zombies in such a way that they can destroy all the turrets on the level.

Progress through levels, fight against various types of turrets, use different types of zombies and their abilities to achieve victory. Choose the right strategies to overcome all obstacles and reach your goal.

Zombies, turrets, the environment - all of this awaits you in "Z Rush".

Are you ready for the challenge and can you destroy all the turrets with your zombies? Test yourself in this exciting strategy game and see if you have what it takes!
